note: Illustrative sample records only. They are fictional examples for contract validation.

items.extracted_summary: Article reports intermittent obstruction near a coastal access path and ongoing community concern.

claims.text: Residents reported intermittent obstruction near a coastal access path.
claims.evidence_snippet: Community members said the path had been blocked on multiple weekends.

items.extracted_summary: Follow-up reporting notes outreach and status updates related to a previously reported access concern.

claims.text: A follow-up report described agency outreach regarding the access concern.
claims.evidence_snippet: The report said local officials met with residents to discuss the issue.

items.extracted_summary: Article summarizes a shoreline development proposal and current filing milestones.

claims.text: The article describes a shoreline development proposal moving through filings.
claims.evidence_snippet: Coverage summarized the current filing milestones for the project.

items.extracted_summary: Article reports erosion impacts and discusses response measures under consideration.

claims.text: The article describes shoreline erosion impacts and response measures under discussion.
claims.evidence_snippet: The report said coastal erosion had prompted discussion of response options.

items.extracted_case_title: Sample: Salinas permitting notice under review
items.extracted_summary: Article references an unresolved permitting dispute and includes language that should be reviewed before publication.

claims.text: The article references an unresolved permitting dispute.
claims.evidence_snippet: The report said the permitting issue remained unresolved at publication time.
